stemHtml:
Air data information is output from an Air Data Computer (ADC) to various aircraft systems. Which of the following options correctly describes valid ADC outputs and their purpose.

1. Angle of attack for flight envelope protection
2. Radio height above terrain for EGPWS computations
3. CAS for the PFD to display the airspeed
4. Pressure altitude for the autopilot and flight director to maintain a selected flight level
5. Mach number used by EGPWS
6. TAS for the INS to compute groundspeed
